name: codex-thread-manager
description: Inspect and re-home local Codex desktop threads across workspaces.

interface.longDescription: Inspects local Codex desktop threads, previews metadata changes, moves threads between workspaces, and supports undo with backup snapshots.
defaultPrompt: List my recent Codex desktop threads.
Preview moving this thread from Core to Helm.
Deep-move this thread to the Helm workspace and keep a rollback backup.
